errors.meaning: The telemetry refresh did not finish before its timeout, so dashboard control-tower data may be outdated until the next successful run.
errors.suggestedFix: Increase this job's timeoutSeconds (or reduce task scope) so it can complete within one run.

errors.meaning: The daily tweet draft job exceeded runtime and stopped before finishing, so no fresh draft was delivered in that run.
errors.suggestedFix: Shorten prompt complexity and cap response length, or raise timeoutSeconds for this job.
